behaviors.description: Validate required patient fields before any downstream processing and return all missing fields in one clear error.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1: Integration, because failure is at the handoff boundary (validator must gate downstream modules). Downgrade check: Unit can validate missing-field logic but cannot prove downstream is not invoked. Upgrade check: no behavior text requires real OS/network/subprocess or AI output, so System/Agentic/Workflow are disqualified.
behaviors.test_description: Run intake orchestration with inputs missing multiple required fields; assert response lists every missing field and assert insurance, triage, scheduling, and confirmation modules are not called.

behaviors.description: Reject invalid DOB values: future dates, dates older than 150 years, and non-date strings.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1: Unit, pure date-validation logic. Downgrade check: no lower level exists. Upgrade check: behavior text contains no module boundary, real infra, or AI dependency; higher levels are not justified.
behaviors.test_description: Table-driven validator test over DOB inputs (valid date, future date, >150 years old, malformed string) asserting correct accept/reject results and error messages.

behaviors.description: Insurance eligibility call sends correct patient ID/plan code and maps eligible/not eligible/pending responses correctly.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1: Integration, because this is module-to-module contract wiring (request construction + response mapping). Downgrade check: Unit would miss request/adapter handoff errors. Upgrade check rejected: behavior does not require real network conditions; deterministic stubbed payer responses cover stated failure mode.
behaviors.test_description: Use a stub payer adapter/server to capture outbound payload and return each status variant; assert sent fields are correct and mapped eligibility state is correct for all three responses.

behaviors.description: If payer API is unreachable, mark eligibility as pending and continue intake flow.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1: System, because failure mode explicitly depends on real HTTP/network unreachability semantics. Downgrade check: Integration with mocked exception can hide real timeout/connection behavior from the HTTP stack. Upgrade check: no AI-quality dependency and not a multi-agentic chain, so Agentic/Workflow are disqualified.
behaviors.test_description: Execute intake against a real HTTP endpoint configured to be unreachable (or real timeout/refusal); assert eligibility becomes pending and pipeline continues to later steps instead of aborting.

behaviors.description: AI triage assigns high urgency for emergency symptom combinations (e.g., chest pain + shortness of breath).
behaviors.justification: Pass 1: Agentic, correctness depends on real model judgment quality/output. Downgrade check: Integration with stubs would always pass and cannot detect mis-triage by the real model. Upgrade check: behavior is a single model decision, not a multi-agentic pipeline, so Workflow is not required.
behaviors.test_description: Run real triage model on curated emergency symptom cases and assert urgency is high with acceptance thresholds over repeated runs to account for nondeterminism.

behaviors.description: AI triage returns clinician-reviewable natural-language explanation, not only a numeric urgency score.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1: Agentic, because explanation quality/content comes from real LLM output. Downgrade check: stubbed text cannot reveal real model failures (empty, irrelevant, non-clinical explanation). Upgrade check: only one agentic step is stated; Workflow is not required.
behaviors.test_description: Call the real triage model and assert output includes a substantive natural-language rationale (not just numeric labels), with rubric checks for clinical readability and symptom-grounded explanation.

behaviors.description: Schedule first available slot by urgency policy: high same-day, medium within 48 hours.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1: Integration, because scheduling policy is enforced through scheduler + calendar DB interaction. Downgrade check: Unit may miss query/order and persistence handoff defects. Upgrade check rejected: no real OS/network/subprocess requirement beyond local DB and no AI dependency.
behaviors.test_description: Seed local calendar DB with constrained availability; run scheduling for high and medium urgency cases and assert selected slot is earliest valid one within required time windows.

behaviors.description: Prevent double-booking when two patients are processed concurrently.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1: Integration, because bug appears at scheduler+DB transaction/locking boundary under concurrent writes. Downgrade check: Unit cannot expose race conditions. Upgrade check: behavior can be exercised with local DB concurrency; no explicit requirement for external OS/network services or AI.
behaviors.test_description: Run two concurrent scheduling requests targeting the same candidate slot against a local transactional calendar DB; assert at most one booking succeeds for that slot and invariants remain consistent.

behaviors.description: Confirmation message contains patient name, appointment time, provider name, and visit-type-specific prep instructions.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1: Unit, primarily message composition/templating logic. Downgrade check: no lower level exists. Upgrade check: behavior text does not require external delivery channel, network, or AI output; higher levels are unnecessary.
behaviors.test_description: Given structured appointment and visit-type inputs, test confirmation renderer/composer output includes all required fields and correct prep instructions for each visit type.

behaviors.description: End-to-end intake pipeline (validate, insurance, triage, schedule, confirm) completes automatically for a real patient submission.
behaviors.justification: Pass 1: Workflow, explicit full pipeline with an agentic triage step plus non-agentic stages in sequence. Downgrade check: System/Agentic alone do not validate full cross-step orchestration outcome. Upgrade check: no higher level exists.
behaviors.test_description: Execute a production-like end-to-end run with real submission input through all stages, including real triage call and live integration points, and assert final confirmation is produced without manual intervention.
